description:
Append the following Acceptance Criteria to the description of requirement 'SRS-5' in the 'SRS' document of the Smart Home Controller project and save the document:

Acceptance Criteria:
1. The system shall respond to user input within 2 seconds under normal operating conditions.
2. All error messages shall be displayed in the user's preferred language.
3. The system shall log all failed authentication attempts.

required_strings: respond to user input within 2 seconds
displayed in the user's preferred language
